vulnerability.name: CVE-2025-15558
vulnerability.description: github.com/docker/cli (Windows) searches C:\ProgramData\Docker\cli-plugins for plugin binaries, allowing local privilege escalation.

statements.impact_statement: CVE-2025-15558 is a Windows-only privilege escalation via C:\ProgramData\Docker\cli-plugins, in the github.com/docker/cli module compiled into the upstream gh binary. maniator/gh publishes only linux/* images, where that path does not exist and the Windows plugin-lookup code cannot execute.
